message:
feat: implement CLI for TOON encode/decode operations

Add command-line interface mirroring the reference toon tool:

CLI module (src/cli/):
- mod.rs: CLI entry point with run() function
- args.rs: Argument parsing placeholder (clap integration)
- conversion.rs: JSON<->TOON conversion orchestration
- json_stream.rs: Streaming JSON output for large inputs
- json_stringify.rs: Pretty-print JSON with configurable indent

Main entry point:
- main.rs: Wire CLI run() with error handling and exit codes

Supports auto-detection of encode/decode based on file extension,
stdin/stdout streaming, and reference-compatible flag interface.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
